'''Jeremy Barlow''' is a writer and former associate editor at [[Dark Horse Comics]]. He edited ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' in its "re-launch" of issues [[Star Wars Tales 21|21]]-[[Star Wars Tales 24|24]].

{{Author-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Writer===
====Comics====
*{{Tales|19|Rather Darkness Visible}} in ''[[Star Wars Tales 19]]''
*''[[Jedi: Yoda]]''
*{{Tales|21|Walking the Path That's Given}} in ''[[Star Wars Tales 21]]'' {{C|as Thomas Andrews}}
*''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]'' {{C|as Thomas Andrews}}
*"[[This Precious Shining]]" in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7]]''
*"[[Pathways]]" in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 8]]''
*''[[Star Wars Adventures: Han Solo and the Hollow Moon of Khorya]]''
*''[[Star Wars Adventures: Princess Leia and the Royal Ransom]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars: The Colossus of Destiny]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars: Deadly Hands of Shon-Ju]]''
*''[[Star Wars Adventures Volume 5: Boba Fett and the Ship of Fear]]''
*[[The Clone Wars: The Enemy Within|''Star Wars:'' ''The Clone Wars: The Enemy Within'']]
*''[[Star Wars: Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir]]'' {{C|adapted from scripts by [[Matt Michnovetz]] and [[Aïda Mashaka Croal]]}}
*"''[[Eyes on the Prize]]''" in ''[[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 6]]''
